sentences.text: Hans said, 'I will have a wonderful time in my garden,' and he started working right away.
However, he could never take care of his flowers because his friend, the Miller, always came by and sent him on long trips or asked for help at the mill.
Little Hans often felt very upset because he worried his flowers would think he had forgotten them, but he comforted himself by remembering that the Miller was his best friend.
Even though Hans was busy helping the Miller, he hoped to spend time in his garden soon.
